'''Merkat''' was a trade [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the [[Merren system/Legends|Merren system]],<ref name="TSK" /> in the [[Chaykin sector/Legends|Chaykin sector]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> It was an endpoint of the [[Harrin Trade Corridor]].<ref name="TSK" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->[[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']] {{1stm}}
